_comment: Versions of pure-Python model libs we maintain as standalone modellibs trees under ~/envs/modellibs/<pkg>-<ver>/. Edit + run tools/bootstrap_modellibs.py to provision missing trees. Dev/nightly versions (e.g. 5.8.0.dev0) are NOT included here — they stay in their torch venv until reproducibly pip-installable. Per design/venv-decouple-modellibs.md.
